# [Sky-runtime](https://omega.gg/Sky-runtime)
---

## [Sky changelog 3.1.1](https://omega.gg/Sky/changes/3.1.1.html)

## Overview

This release integrates [qwindowkit](https://github.com/stdware/qwindowkit) as a new 3rdparty
dependency. ControllerCore gains a pathShots function and fixes Linux path handling for AppImage.
Python build scripts are updated and SKY_PATH_BIN is standardized across bash scripts.

## Core

- ControllerCore: Add pathShots function.

- ControllerCore: Fix Linux path(s).


## bash

- python: Update build.sh.

- Update SKY_PATH_BIN.


## 3rdparty

- Add [qwindowkit](https://github.com/stdware/qwindowkit).
